g.text: In-document link click — open in the pane + per-tab scroll restore
click (the bug fix: open IN the pane)
.preventDefault — do NOT let Electron replace the window
nav-active — save the leaving :scroll on the current
Each history entry is {:uri :scroll}, so Back restores BOTH the document and
the exact scroll position it had when you left it. The restore is deferred one
frame (+ a short settle) so a tall document does not clamp the target against a
not-yet-complete scroll height. HTTP tabs scroll themselves — no pane restore.
